files.description: Entire module is placeholder implementation returning dummy metrics
MLX device integration marked as placeholder for future implementation
Multiple functions return empty vectors or true as placeholders
Metal, unified, and Neural Engine memory allocation marked as placeholders
Image tensor conversion creates deterministic tensor from hash instead of actual processing
No-op TelemetryWriter when telemetry features not available
All methods return errors indicating Secure Enclave not available

description: Placeholder implementations in telemetry, GPU metrics, alerting, memory management, vision domain, and platform stubs. These return dummy data or no-op behavior.
impact: Reduced functionality in metrics collection, alerting, and vision processing
